title: apium chilense
intro: Apium chilense, also known as Chilean celery or Chilean smallage, is a plant species in the carrot family that is native to Chile. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Apium chilense include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting digestive health. Apium chilense can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional remedies to alleviate symptoms of colds, fevers, and digestive issues.
